author: doll-agent
content: Add formatting.rs with Display impls for all 6 basis types. Shared format_polynomial helper with basis-specific term-name: x^i / T_i(x) / P_i(x) / H_i(x) / He_i(x) / L_i(x). Zero coeffs skipped, unit coeffs implicit, negatives use ' - ', zero polynomial prints as '0'. ASCII-only. 12 tests.
